reviews.comment:
Quiero agradecer a Verónica del full de Cipoletti, que me guardo y cuido el bolso olvidado en dicha estación. El valor de todo lo que hizo, ya que me encuentro a 800 km de ese lugar y pudieron enviármelo por vía Cargo a mi destino. Gracias Vero !!!gracias personal de la full Cipoletti. Rosana Calvete DNI 17.353.779 - Pcia de Bs As.

(Translated by Google)
I want to thank Verónica from the Cipoletti Full Station for keeping my bag safe and sound at their station. Everything she did was invaluable, especially since I'm 800 km away and they were able to ship it to me via cargo. Thank you, Vero! Thank you to the staff at the Cipoletti Full Station. Rosana Calvete, ID 17.353.779 - Province of Buenos Aires.
